name: 地禍駐車場 -The Cursed Underground Parking Lot-
short_description: After finishing work, the protagonist heads to the underground parking lot to retrieve their car. For some reason, their car is nowhere to be found, and as they search, strange events unfold one after another...
detailed_description:
After finishing work, the protagonist heads to the underground parking lot to retrieve their car.

For some reason, their car is nowhere to be found, and as they search, strange events unfold one after another...

----------

This is a horror game set in an underground parking lot with an FPS perspective.
The playtime is around 10-15 minutes, making it easy to jump in and play.

----------

[Video Streaming Guidelines]

・Streaming is allowed without permission for both individuals and corporations.

・Monetization is only permitted through the features provided by video streaming platforms.

・Including the game's name in the title or adding a Steam page link in the description would be appreciated.

・We are not responsible for any damages caused by streaming videos of this game.

・These guidelines are subject to change without prior notice.
